Main table → Load Configuration Fields → Saturation Mode Bits

Saturation Mode Bits

Instruction Type and Width                   Instruction description
Vector Double Word Saturation and Store Pre- Sets the Vector Double Word Saturation and Store Pre-Shift bit
Shift                                        field.
Vector Extended Long Saturation              Sets the Vector Extended Long Saturation bit field.

Vector Extended Long Saturation and Store    Sets the Vector Extended Long Saturation and Store Pre-Shift bit
Pre-Shift                                    field.
Vector Word Saturation and Store Pre-Shift   Sets the Vector Word Saturation and Store Pre-Shift bit field.
Vector Word/Double-Word Saturation           Sets the Vector Word/Double-Word Saturation bit field.
